scope: Plan-only scaffold for balanced 100-packet evidence-grade benchmark factory.

seams.name: BEC callback provenance
seams.action_boundary: May AP release payment against an invoice after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?

seams.name: AP duplicate / true-up / PO authority
seams.action_boundary: May AP release payment when invoice amount, duplicate, true-up, or PO authority signals require cross-document reconciliation?

seams.name: IAM geo-jump / separation-of-duties delegation
seams.action_boundary: May an access or privileged action proceed when geo, SOD, or emergency delegation signals require actor, scope, privilege, and window reconciliation?

seams.name: DFARS source-control provenance
seams.action_boundary: May procurement or payment proceed when regulated source-control evidence must bind supplier, NSN, CLIN, campaign, and delivery scope?

seams.name: PE consolidation period-scope
seams.action_boundary: May fund operations accept consolidation or ownership-period figures when period scope must reconcile across close date, trial balance, and allocation evidence?

pair_families.action_boundary: May AP release payment against an invoice after a recent vendor-master payment/contact change?
pair_families.material_delta: Callback source provenance: pre-change vendor-master phone in ALLOW sibling vs change-request/new-contact phone in ESCALATE sibling.
pair_families.notes: Existing judged pair. ALLOW sibling produced a HoloGov false escalation from trigger-vs-completion confusion; patch/regression exists. Needs post-patch rerun before proof_credit_ready.

Scout prompt/budget patch has been applied; current status is prompt_patch_applied_pending_rescout. No packet repair, prefreeze, or proof credit is recommended before a later approved clean diagnostic rescout.

next_production_batch.rationale: HBB-BEC-001 and HBB-BEC-002 already occupy two BEC callback-provenance family slots. Eight new planned BEC pair families complete the 10-family BEC seam before moving to AP/IAM/DFARS/PE.
